text: Buy Hostinger KVM 2 VPS → share IP + root password (Phase 9 deploy)
Set up Trakteer product page (AI Employee Setup Kit, Rp 299k)
Set up ManyChat auto-DM (keywords: caranya, AI, bob, link)
Install Tailscale (Mac + iPhone) for remote dashboard access
Run npx prisma migrate deploy on VPS (Phase 9)
